fasten.def: 紮緊、繫牢、集中(注意力)的人的人
fasten.col: fasten seatbelt, fasten eyes on, fasten door

fastener/zip.def: 緊固件、拉鍊、紐扣、繫的人人物 (單數) (扣)
fastener/zip.ex: The_fastener on my coat is broken.

fasten-ing/button.def: 繫牢物、搭扣、拉鍊人物 (單數) (扣)

fastidious/fussy.def: 挑剔的、苛求的、過分講究地的人的人物 (單數) (挑)
fastidious/fussy.ex: He is very fastidious about food.

fastidiously.def: 挑剔地、苛求地、過分講究地

fastness/speed.def: 迅速、牢固、要塞、染固度人物 (單數) (快/牢)

fast-track/fast.def: 快速處理的、快速通道的人物、提拔、加速的人的人人物 (單數) (快)
fast-track/fast.ex: He is on a fast-track to success.

fat/grease.def: 肥胖的、多脂肪的、豐富地的人的人物、脂肪、肥肉的人物人物 (單數) (肥/脂)
fat/grease.col: saturated fat, fat man, fat salary, fat chance (沒機會)

fatal/deadly.def: 致命的、災難性的、命定地的人的人物 (單數) (命/災)
fatal/deadly.col: fatal accident, fatal flaw, fatal error, fatal disease

fatality/death.def: 死亡(事故)、災禍、天命人物 (單數) (命/死)

fatally/fatally.ex: He was fatally injured in crash.

fate/destiny.def: 命運、天數、厄運人物 (單數) (命/運)
fate/destiny.col: twist of fate, share same fate, met his fate
fate/destiny.ex: Death is the_common fate of all.

fate-.def: 命、致命的人的人人物 (單數) (命)
fate-.ex: On that fateful day in May.
